learnedContext: Health check flow worked and quickly identified missing freshness signal as the main risk. Tricky part is inferring broker connectivity without a dedicated heartbeat artifact, so adding explicit connectivity/state files would improve confidence.

Health check correctly identified stale position-sync as primary degradation and dispatched reconcile tasks; broker connectivity inference remains heuristic without a dedicated heartbeat/state artifact.

Health check again caught stale/missing position-sync as the primary degradations and reconcile dispatches worked quickly. Broker connectivity is still inferred from UI/schedule signals, so explicit heartbeat artifacts remain the key reliability upgrade.

Health pass remains most reliable at catching stale/missing position-sync quickly; without a dedicated broker/datafeed heartbeat artifact, connectivity is still heuristic and should remain flagged as degraded when uncertain.

Health checks continue to catch stale/missing position-sync quickly and reconcile dispatch flow is working. Connectivity confidence remains heuristic without a dedicated broker/datafeed heartbeat artifact, so degraded status is safest when uncertain.

Health check continues to identify stale/missing position-sync as top actionable risk; dispatch-based reconciliation is working. Connectivity confidence is still heuristic without explicit broker/datafeed heartbeat artifacts, so degraded remains safest when uncertain.

Health check remains outside configured market window, so no corrective dispatches were needed; recurring pattern is that stale position-sync is the top actionable risk during active hours while connectivity confidence stays heuristic without explicit heartbeat artifacts.
